{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Assistant to the Chief Executive Officer (CEO)",
  "description": "Bradfield consulting is a professional service firm created to provide human resource solutions for organizations of any size. Our goal is to help our esteemed clients eliminate issues bordering on having incompatible or inexperienced employees. Our partnership begins from attracting the right employees, settling them well at work and ensuring that they are equipped to deliver on your goals.

Our culture of seamless collaboration enables us to go well beyond recruitment; we meet with every client, seeking to understand their needs and culture in a bid to engage the perfect candidate fit for them. This collaborative culture of problem-solving enables us to add great value to our clients businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant to the Chief Executive Officer (CEO)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Overall Purpose of the Job


	The Personal Assistant to the CEO has the primary responsibility of ensuring the efficient functioning of the CEO&#39;s office.
	The role&rsquo;s responsibilities will encompass a wide array of administrative, managerial, and strategic tasks.
	It will act as a gatekeeper, handling communications, managing schedules, and coordinating various activities crucial to the CEO&#39;s productivity.


Job Responsibilities


	Administrative Support: Manage the CEO&rsquo;s calendar, arrange meetings,coordinate travel, and handle correspondence. Ensure the CEO is well-prepared for meetings by providing necessary documents and briefs.
	Communication Liaison: Act as the primary point of contact between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders. Maintain effective communication flow within the organization.
	Project Coordination: Assist in managing key projects and initiatives. Collaborate with various teams to ensure projects align with the company&#39;s strategic objectives.
	Information Management: Organize and maintain confidential information, files, and records. Handle sensitive information with the utmost discretion.
	Strategic Support: Assist in the preparation of reports, presentations, andproposals. Conduct research and provide insights that aid in decision-making processes.
	Event Coordination: Organize and oversee company events, meetings, and other special occasions involving the CEO.
	Philanthropy Management: Establishing and management of the Foundation as well as all other philanthropic commitments.


Role alignment with Organization&#39;s goals:


	This role directly contributes to the CEO&rsquo;s effectiveness, enabling the CEO to focus on strategic initiatives and the overall growth of the company.
	By managing the CEO&rsquo;s office efficiently, the role ensures streamlined operations, effective communication, and strategic support.
	This alignment is crucial for achieving the company&#39;s mission of providing innovative cloud solutions, IT education, and infrastructure services,empowering organizations across industries to thrive in a rapidly evolving technological landscape.


(KPIs, Indicators of success.)


	Efficient Calendar Management
	Effective Communication Handling
	Project Support and Coordination
	Strategic Support
	Information and Document Management
	Event Management
	Adaptability and Problem-Solving
	Professionalism and Discretion


Qualification


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or a related field. Additional certifications or coursework in Executive Assistance or Office Management are a plus.
	5+ years of experience in a similar role, preferably supporting C-level executives.
	Experience in the technology industry or related fields is highly valued due to the complex nature of the company&#39;s operations.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and other relevant software.
	Knowledge of project management tools and communication platforms.


Required Competencies:


	Technical Acumen: Understanding of the technology industry, cloud solutions, IT education, and infrastructure services.
	Business Operations: Knowledge of administrative and operational processes within a corporate environment.
	Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills to effectively interact with diverse stakeholders.
	Information Management: Ability to handle sensitive information and maintain confidentiality.
	Organizational Skills: Strong ability to manage multiple tasks, prioritize effectively, and meet deadlines.
	Problem-Solving: Capacity to identify issues and provide innovative solutions.
	Adaptability: Flexibility in managing unforeseen challenges and changing priorities.
	Detail-Oriented: Attentiveness to accuracy and precision in all tasks.
	Proactive Approach: Initiative to anticipate needs and act accordingly without explicit instruction.
	Professionalism: Displaying a high level of professionalism and discretion in handling sensitive information.
	Team Player: Collaboration and support for various teams within the organization.
	Adaptability and Resilience: Ability to remain composed and efficient under pressure.


General Working Conditions:
(e.g. shift work, driver&rsquo;s license, specific tools, special clothing, environmental requirements, etc.)


	Normal working condition
	Local and international travel
	May be required to work extra hours.
	Performance Quality Standards.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-07",
  "validThrough": "2026-03-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Bradfield Consulting"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",

    "value": "195575"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Personal Assistant to the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) Job at Bradfield consulting




        
    

        
        Bradfield consulting is a professional service firm created to provide human resource solutions for organizations of any size. Our goal is to help our esteemed clients eliminate issues bordering on having incompatible or inexperienced employees. Our partnership begins from attracting the right employees, settling them well at work and ensuring that they are equipped to deliver on your goals.

Our culture of seamless collaboration enables us to go well beyond recruitment; we meet with every client, seeking to understand their needs and culture in a bid to engage the perfect candidate fit for them. This collaborative culture of problem-solving enables us to add great value to our clients businesses.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant to the Chief Executive Officer (CEO)

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Overall Purpose of the Job


	The Personal Assistant to the CEO has the primary responsibility of ensuring the efficient functioning of the CEO's office.
	The role’s responsibilities will encompass a wide array of administrative, managerial, and strategic tasks.
	It will act as a gatekeeper, handling communications, managing schedules, and coordinating various activities crucial to the CEO's productivity.


Job Responsibilities


	Administrative Support: Manage the CEO’s calendar, arrange meetings,coordinate travel, and handle correspondence. Ensure the CEO is well-prepared for meetings by providing necessary documents and briefs.
	Communication Liaison: Act as the primary point of contact between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders. Maintain effective communication flow within the organization.
	Project Coordination: Assist in managing key projects and initiatives. Collaborate with various teams to ensure projects align with the company's strategic objectives.
	Information Management: Organize and maintain confidential information, files, and records. Handle sensitive information with the utmost discretion.
	Strategic Support: Assist in the preparation of reports, presentations, andproposals. Conduct research and provide insights that aid in decision-making processes.
	Event Coordination: Organize and oversee company events, meetings, and other special occasions involving the CEO.
	Philanthropy Management: Establishing and management of the Foundation as well as all other philanthropic commitments.


Role alignment with Organization's goals:


	This role directly contributes to the CEO’s effectiveness, enabling the CEO to focus on strategic initiatives and the overall growth of the company.
	By managing the CEO’s office efficiently, the role ensures streamlined operations, effective communication, and strategic support.
	This alignment is crucial for achieving the company's mission of providing innovative cloud solutions, IT education, and infrastructure services,empowering organizations across industries to thrive in a rapidly evolving technological landscape.


(KPIs, Indicators of success.)


	Efficient Calendar Management
	Effective Communication Handling
	Project Support and Coordination
	Strategic Support
	Information and Document Management
	Event Management
	Adaptability and Problem-Solving
	Professionalism and Discretion


Qualification


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Management, or a related field. Additional certifications or coursework in Executive Assistance or Office Management are a plus.
	5+ years of experience in a similar role, preferably supporting C-level executives.
	Experience in the technology industry or related fields is highly valued due to the complex nature of the company's operations.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and other relevant software.
	Knowledge of project management tools and communication platforms.


Required Competencies:


	Technical Acumen: Understanding of the technology industry, cloud solutions, IT education, and infrastructure services.
	Business Operations: Knowledge of administrative and operational processes within a corporate environment.
	Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills to effectively interact with diverse stakeholders.
	Information Management: Ability to handle sensitive information and maintain confidentiality.
	Organizational Skills: Strong ability to manage multiple tasks, prioritize effectively, and meet deadlines.
	Problem-Solving: Capacity to identify issues and provide innovative solutions.
	Adaptability: Flexibility in managing unforeseen challenges and changing priorities.
	Detail-Oriented: Attentiveness to accuracy and precision in all tasks.
	Proactive Approach: Initiative to anticipate needs and act accordingly without explicit instruction.
	Professionalism: Displaying a high level of professionalism and discretion in handling sensitive information.
	Team Player: Collaboration and support for various teams within the organization.
	Adaptability and Resilience: Ability to remain composed and efficient under pressure.


General Working Conditions:
(e.g. shift work, driver’s license, specific tools, special clothing, environmental requirements, etc.)


	Normal working condition
	Local and international travel
	May be required to work extra hours.
	Performance Quality Standards.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Backend Developer",
  "description": "At Walex Biz Nigeria Limited, We Provide powerful web hosting service of all kinds ranging shared hosting, VPS hosting, Email Hosting, Reseller Hosting, Email Hosting and Dedicated Hosting. with high-performance infrastructure and high level security. We are also into all cloud computing applications development including web, mobile applications and cloud technologies. we develop and designed with one question in mind - How does this new technology help people and what problem does it solve?.

Walex Biz also provides Cyber Security technology that increases your agility to stay away from cyber threats and protect you seamlessly. our penetration testing team uses an industry leading methodology to identify hard-to-find vulnerabilities and weaknesses often missed by conventional testing. We offer a variety of services including infrastructure penetration testing, web and mobile application testing, social engineering, red team exercises, source-code reviews and exploit development all to help you protect your most valuable assets - your data and your company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Backend Developer
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Description


	Actively participate in the overall application lifecycle.
	Focus on coding and debugging.
	Collaborate with front-end developers.
	Define and communicate technical and design requirements.
	Build a high-quality reusable code that can be used in the future.
	Create sustainable and functional web applications with clean codes.
	Learn about new technologies and stay up to date with current best practices.
	Conduct UI tests and optimize performance.
	Train, help, and support to other team members.
	Develop and manage well-functioning databases and applications
	Write effective APIs
	Test software to ensure responsiveness and efficiency
	Troubleshoot, debug and upgrade software
	Create security and data protection settings
	Build features and applications with a mobile responsive design
	Write technical documentation
	Work with data scientists and analysts to improve software


Job Requirements


	2+ years of experience and above
	Must reside in Abuja
	Must be available for on-site job
	Fluency / Understanding of PHP/Laravel in an advanced level is a MUST.
	Strong understanding of the web development cycle and programming techniques
	Must understand the microservice architecture
	Understand accessibility and security compliance
	Data migration, transformation and scripting
	User authentication and authorization between multiple systems, servers and environments
	Implement automated testing platforms and unit tests.
",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-08",

Backend Developer Job at Walex Biz Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

At Walex Biz Nigeria Limited, We Provide powerful web hosting service of all kinds ranging shared hosting, VPS hosting, Email Hosting, Reseller Hosting, Email Hosting and Dedicated Hosting. with high-performance infrastructure and high level security. We are also into all cloud computing applications development including web, mobile applications and cloud technologies. we develop and designed with one question in mind - How does this new technology help people and what problem does it solve?.

Walex Biz also provides Cyber Security technology that increases your agility to stay away from cyber threats and protect you seamlessly. our penetration testing team uses an industry leading methodology to identify hard-to-find vulnerabilities and weaknesses often missed by conventional testing. We offer a variety of services including infrastructure penetration testing, web and mobile application testing, social engineering, red team exercises, source-code reviews and exploit development all to help you protect your most valuable assets - your data and your company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Backend Developer
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Description


	Actively participate in the overall application lifecycle.
	Focus on coding and debugging.
	Collaborate with front-end developers.
	Define and communicate technical and design requirements.
	Build a high-quality reusable code that can be used in the future.
	Create sustainable and functional web applications with clean codes.
	Learn about new technologies and stay up to date with current best practices.
	Conduct UI tests and optimize performance.
	Train, help, and support to other team members.
	Develop and manage well-functioning databases and applications
	Write effective APIs
	Test software to ensure responsiveness and efficiency
	Troubleshoot, debug and upgrade software
	Create security and data protection settings
	Build features and applications with a mobile responsive design
	Write technical documentation
	Work with data scientists and analysts to improve software


Job Requirements


	2+ years of experience and above
	Must reside in Abuja
	Must be available for on-site job
	Fluency / Understanding of PHP/Laravel in an advanced level is a MUST.
	Strong understanding of the web development cycle and programming techniques
	Must understand the microservice architecture
	Understand accessibility and security compliance
	Data migration, transformation and scripting
	User authentication and authorization between multiple systems, servers and environments
	Implement automated testing platforms and unit

Relationship Officer Job at Grey Hales Concepts Limited




        
    

        
        Grey Hales Concepts Limited is a professional financial services firm based in Lagos, Nigeria. The company specializes in loan administration, credit management, and financial operations support. With a strong commitment to integrity, efficiency, and customer satisfaction, Grey Hales Concepts Ltd provides structured financial solutions tailored to individuals and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Relationship Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary‎
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	‎We are looking for a customer-oriented service representative.


Responsibilities


	‎Manage large amounts of incoming phone calls
	‎Generate sales leads
	‎Identify and assess customers’ needs to achieve satisfaction
	‎Build sustainable relationships and trust with customer accounts through open and interactive communication
	‎Provide accurate, valid and complete information by using the right methods/tools
	‎Meet personal/customer service team sales targets and call handling quotas
	‎Handle customer complaints, provide appropriate solutions and alternatives within the time limits; follow up to ensure resolution
	‎Keep records of customer interactions, process customer accounts and file documents
	‎Follow communication procedures, guidelines and policies
	‎Take the extra mile to engage customers.


‎‎Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications
	Track record of over-achieving quota
	‎Strong phone contact handling skills and active listening
	‎Familiarity with CRM systems and practices
	‎Customer orientation and ability to adapt/respond to different types of characters
	‎Excellent communication and presentation skills
	‎Ability to multi-task, prioritize, and manage time effectively.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 /month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: greyhaleslimited@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Branch Manager – Wealth Management (Finance)",
  "description": "Bradfield consulting is a professional service firm created to provide human resource solutions for organizations of any size. Our goal is to help our esteemed clients eliminate issues bordering on having incompatible or inexperienced employees. Our partnership begins from attracting the right employees, settling them well at work and ensuring that they are equipped to deliver on your goals.

Our culture of seamless collaboration enables us to go well beyond recruitment; we meet with every client, seeking to understand their needs and culture in a bid to engage the perfect candidate fit for them. This collaborative culture of problem-solving enables us to add great value to our clients businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branch Manager &ndash; Wealth Management (Finance)

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Objectives


	The Branch Manager is responsible for selling the company&rsquo;s liability generation products as well as meeting and exceeding assigned target by the company.
	The primary focus will be Liability generation, onboarding of companies for group loan and corporate lending. He/She will also be expected to deliver bespoke value-added service and customer experience to current and prospective clients.


Responsibilities
The specific and general functions are shown below:


	Funds mobilization and process managementLoan sales and process management.
	Branch relationship management both internal and external.
	Branch administration and profitability.
	Staff engagement and management.
	Proactive with new to bank and ensuring strong service delivery.
	Branch management and organization.
	Follow up on clients account to ensure minimal withdrawal.
	Follow through customers documentation from end to end to always ensure that all requirements are met.
	Process customers request and ensure prompt service delivery.


Key Performance Indicators


	Drive up revenue of sales by supporting loan sales through identifying opportunities from customers.
	Achieve 100% of your investment/deposit target to support the company&rsquo;s financial goals.
	Achieve diversification of the treasury portfolio in relation to its&rsquo; offerings.
	Grow the Corporate Lending portfolio of the branchEnsure 100% KYC compliance.
	Reduce departments expenditure through cost saving initiatives Support colleagues in meeting customers and closing complex deals.
	Have exceptional product knowledge and always communicate clearly and ensure customer understanding.
	Deliver superior customer experience by establishing and enforcing organizational standards.
	Efficiency in running branch operations and processes.
	Complete and clear documentation of customer request and interactions.
	Clear and precise report on branch activities and performance.
	Coaching team members to improve on leadership and job performance.


Qualifications


	B.Sc. in Business Administration, Marketing, Banking and Finance, or any other related course.
	Experience: Minimum of 7 years or more in the financial sector.
	Professional certifications in marketing and customer relationship management are essential.


Knowledge and Abilities:


	Possess good understanding of the company&rsquo;s product.
	Sound presentation and negotiation skills.
	Smart, agile, and presentable (ability to represent the FCL person).
	Excellent communication skills, strong selling and marketing skills.
	Strong knowledge of target characteristics and effective management skill.
	This role offers great opportunities for training and career growth in a disruptive and technologically enhanced work environment.


Salary
N400,000 - N500,000 / month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and every necessary document to:&nbsp;bradfiledforms@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-03-21",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Bradfield Consulting"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

Branch Manager – Wealth Management (Finance) Job at Bradfield Consulting




        
    

        
        Bradfield consulting is a professional service firm created to provide human resource solutions for organizations of any size. Our goal is to help our esteemed clients eliminate issues bordering on having incompatible or inexperienced employees. Our partnership begins from attracting the right employees, settling them well at work and ensuring that they are equipped to deliver on your goals.

Our culture of seamless collaboration enables us to go well beyond recruitment; we meet with every client, seeking to understand their needs and culture in a bid to engage the perfect candidate fit for them. This collaborative culture of problem-solving enables us to add great value to our clients businesses.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Branch Manager – Wealth Management (Finance)

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Objectives


	The Branch Manager is responsible for selling the company’s liability generation products as well as meeting and exceeding assigned target by the company.
	The primary focus will be Liability generation, onboarding of companies for group loan and corporate lending. He/She will also be expected to deliver bespoke value-added service and customer experience to current and prospective clients.


Responsibilities
The specific and general functions are shown below:


	Funds mobilization and process managementLoan sales and process management.
	Branch relationship management both internal and external.
	Branch administration and profitability.
	Staff engagement and management.
	Proactive with new to bank and ensuring strong service delivery.
	Branch management and organization.
	Follow up on clients account to ensure minimal withdrawal.
	Follow through customers documentation from end to end to always ensure that all requirements are met.
	Process customers request and ensure prompt service delivery.


Key Performance Indicators


	Drive up revenue of sales by supporting loan sales through identifying opportunities from customers.
	Achieve 100% of your investment/deposit target to support the company’s financial goals.
	Achieve diversification of the treasury portfolio in relation to its’ offerings.
	Grow the Corporate Lending portfolio of the branchEnsure 100% KYC compliance.
	Reduce departments expenditure through cost saving initiatives Support colleagues in meeting customers and closing complex deals.
	Have exceptional product knowledge and always communicate clearly and ensure customer understanding.
	Deliver superior customer experience by establishing and enforcing organizational standards.
	Efficiency in running branch operations and processes.
	Complete and clear documentation of customer request and interactions.
	Clear and precise report on branch activities and performance.
	Coaching team members to improve on leadership and job performance.


Qualifications


	B.Sc. in Business Administration, Marketing, Banking and Finance, or any other related course.
	Experience: Minimum of 7 years or more in the financial sector.
	Professional certifications in marketing and customer relationship management are essential.


Knowledge and Abilities:


	Possess good understanding of the company’s product.
	Sound presentation and negotiation skills.
	Smart, agile, and presentable (ability to represent the FCL person).
	Excellent communication skills, strong selling and marketing skills.
	Strong knowledge of target characteristics and effective management skill.
	This role offers great opportunities for training and career growth in a disruptive and technologically enhanced work environment.


Salary
N400,000 - N500,000 / month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and every necessary document to: bradfiledforms@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
